name: Ret-time Reviver Emit-ter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>きる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>偲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しの</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>びのシルキィ
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 face-up monster on each field; change them to face-down Defense Position, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Ret-time Reviver Emit-ter" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 face-up monster on each field; change them to face-down Defense Position, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Ret-time Reviver Emit-ter" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 face-up monster on each field; change them to face-down Defense Position, and if you do, Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Ret-time Reviver Emit-ter" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
